---
author: "James Hetherington"
date: 2026-06-04
format: revealjs
title: "A talk about Automating discovery"
---

# Let's learn a game

# Why isn't chess like science?

:::: {.two-col}
::: {}
* Perfect knowledge of the state of the world.
* Perfect knowledge of the rules.
* Perfect predictability of the consequences of actions.
:::
::: {}
{{< image-credit width="60%" src="assets/generated/starting_position.svg" alt="The starting position of a chess game" >}}
:::
::::

# How to play Kriegspiel

# What does Kriegspiel tell us about science?

# Partially Observed Decision Problems

# Physics-free gravity

# Uncertainty in Physics-free gravity

# Put the planets where you want them!

# Automated experimentation
